content: 34 Jami-Lee Ross said that his plan for the party was based on the structure and make-up of the Alliance Party , and he proposed an arrangement where smaller parties would maintain their own identity and board, but stand candidates under a shared party list as Advance
summary: 34 Jami-Lee Ross said that his plan for the party was based on the structure and make-up of the Alliance Party , and he proposed an arrangement where smaller parties would maintain their own identity and board, but stand candidates under a shared party list as Advance
